overview.description: The WisdomTree Emerging Markets Corporate Bond Fund (EMCB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF with a focus on investment- and non-investment-grade corporate debt of emerging-market countries. The fund manager may invest using derivatives. EMCB was launched on Mar 8, 2012 and is issued by WisdomTree.
